art_highlights: Art Basel & UBS Global Art Market Report 2026: Market rebounded with 4% growth ($59.6B) in 2025; renewed optimism for 2026.
Auction sales saw a 9% jump to $20.7B, with works over $1M up 21%; U.S. continues to lead with 44% market share ($26B).
Dealer sector 'structural reset' ongoing, adapting to volatility; sales grew 2% to $34.8B.
Art Fairs regaining prominence, now 35% of dealer turnover; Art Basel Hong Kong (Mar 27-29) upcoming.
Emerging trends: Younger collectors dominating via social discovery (Instagram), and multi-medium collections becoming standard.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Cautious optimism; 43% of dealers expect growth in 2026.
market_summary.key_drivers: High-end auction recovery (+9%), structural adaptation in dealer sector, and shifting demographics.
market_summary.trend: Correction in contemporary segments balanced by high-end resilience; pivot to local collector focus and experiential sales.
